name: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (we, us, our, the Company, or Lamb Weston) is a leading global producer, distributor, and marketer of value-added frozen potato products and is headquartered in Eagle, Idaho. We are the number one supplier of value-added frozen potato products in North America and a leading supplier of value-added frozen potato products internationally, with a strong presence in high-growth emerging markets.
